content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月08日 周三
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [simonlin1212/Vibe-Research](https://github.com/simonlin1212/Vibe-Research)
   Vibe-Research: Your Personal Trading Research Agent · A股/美股/港股 的个人投研 Agent：每日复盘、 | ⭐438
2. [Pluviobyte/rnskill](https://github.com/Pluviobyte/rnskill)
   雪踏乌云的 AI Agent Skills 集合 | ⭐360
3. [eli-labz/Cognitive-Core-Skills](https://github.com/eli-labz/Cognitive-Core-Skills)
   A universal, industry-neutral taxonomy of cognitive core skills (perception, mem | ⭐274
4. [avifenesh/bw24](https://github.com/avifenesh/bw24)
   From-scratch Rust+CUDA LLM inference engine for RTX 5090 (sm_120a) — NVFP4, MoE, | ⭐255
5. [SmileLikeYe/agent-chief](https://github.com/SmileLikeYe/agent-chief)
    | ⭐155
6. [RennAkira/spicy-monopoly](https://github.com/RennAkira/spicy-monopoly)
   和你的 AI 一起玩的双人棋盘小游戏 · 18+ （A two-player board game you play with your AI — dice,  | ⭐151
7. [nexu-io/motion-anything](https://github.com/nexu-io/motion-anything)
   ✨ The agentic motion layer — an open-source, chat-native motion engine. Describe | ⭐144
8. [olemeyer/rocketplaneIO](https://github.com/olemeyer/rocketplaneIO)
   Self-hosted AI SRE for Kubernetes — zero-instrumentation eBPF observability plus | ⭐122

- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
